raw_comment:
I noticed that three countries that are shown in the graph have the highest population out of the world, and it is also showing the the United States and china create the most amount of energy compared to everywhere else.

I wonder why china and the United States produce the most energy, because if you didn’t see this you would think that china and us use the most energy out of the rest of the countries.  I also wonder why India having the largest population does not have the most energy. 

This relates to my community because I live in the U.S where is considered to be one of the countries that produces the most amount of energy. So this can affect the amount of pollution in my area because of the energy usage. 

“Clean energy or more energy” This graph shows the amount of fuel and the pollution of energy that is made.

The graph shows that the United States creates the most amount of energy compared to everywhere else.
The graph shows that china creates the most amount of energy compared to everywhere else.
I wonder why china produces the most energy.
I wonder why the United States produces the most energy.

India does not have the most energy.

This can affect the amount of pollution in my area.
This can affect the amount of pollution in my area because of the energy usage.

This graph shows the amount of fuel.
